---
name: "Repo Assist — Custom command"
about: "Give Repo Assist a free-form instruction to run in command mode."
title: "[repo-assist] "
labels: ["repo-assist"]
---
/repo-assist <describe exactly what you want done>

<!--
Keep the /repo-assist line as the FIRST line of this issue — that is what triggers command mode.
Replace the text after /repo-assist with your instruction (e.g. "Run Task 1 for all unlabelled issues",
or a specific, self-contained request). Command mode skips weighted selection and does exactly this.
Only owners/members/collaborators can trigger it. Repo Assist proposes draft PRs only — it never merges.
-->

**Details / constraints (optional):**
-
